<!--
Thanks for contributing to Gitty. A few quick notes:
- For non-trivial behavior changes, please open an issue first so we can discuss the approach.
- Please do not open PRs that only update npm packages, lockfiles, or GitHub Actions versions. Maintainers and approved automated bots handle those.
- Follow Conventional Commits in your commit messages and PR title. See CONTRIBUTING.md.
- Remove secrets, private repository names, tokens, and confidential patch content from screenshots, logs, and examples.
-->

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #1234 -->

## Changes

## Verification

<!--
List automated and manual checks.
For terminal UI changes, include the terminal sizes or flows tested when relevant.
-->

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] Manual verification completed, or N/A with reason:

## Screenshots or recordings

<!-- Add before/after screenshots or terminal recordings for visible UI changes when useful. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated, or N/A with reason
- [ ] README or docs updated if CLI behavior, controls, GitHub PR behavior, or development steps changed
- [ ] GitHub PR behavior tested with `gh`, or N/A with reason
- [ ] No breaking changes, or breaking changes are called out explicitly above
